result.summary: Found 2 issues: a major text truncation problem and a minor layout concern with partially visible game cards.

issues.description: Navigation tab text is cut off - 'Hot Gar' appears truncated, should likely read 'Hot Games'
issues.suggestion: Adjust the width of the navigation container or reduce padding/font size to ensure all tab labels display completely without clipping

issues.description: Game cards in the exclusive games carousel appear partially cut off on the right edge, making some game images and content not fully visible
issues.suggestion: Adjust carousel padding or ensure proper overflow handling so that card edges are fully visible or smoothly scroll into view
